notes: This file is the complete, axiom-clean discharge of Silverman III.8.1d (Frobenius Weil-pairing scaling), structured as a clean four-level composition: abstract algebra core (weilPairing_galois_core) → Prop-typed leaf bundle (FrobeniusGaloisData) → geometric residual proved via imported lemmas (frobeniusGaloisGeometric_holds) → final assembly (frobeniusScaling_holds). The longest proof (frobeniusGaloisGeometric_holds, 36 lines) is dominated by the frobeniusHomBaseChange ↔ geomFrobeniusPoint bridge needed because the two imported leaf lemmas use different but equal point-map representations. frobeniusScaling_holds is consumed directly by HasseBound.lean as leaf 1 of the Hasse bound.
